metadata.description: XOLoop — loop-based code improvement framework for Claude Code. 8 modes: build, polish, fuzz, benchmark, improve, audit, autoresearch, overnight.

plugins.name: xoloop
plugins.description: Loop-based code improvement — tournament-based polishing, TDD building, property-based fuzzing, Codex+Opus audit loop, Champion-vs-Challenger autoresearch, and overnight orchestration. Works in any Node or Python repo.
